title: Gina i18n catalog
description: Per-bundle message catalog. Lives at `bundle/locales/<culture>.json` (e.g. en.json, en_US.json, fr.json). Eager-loaded by lib/i18n at bundle start. Resolved via dotted-path keys (e.g. "common.welcome"). Plural forms are detected when (a) the caller passes `count` AND (b) the resolved value is an object whose own keys are all CLDR plural categories (zero, one, two, few, many, other) and whose values are all strings.

oneOf.description: Translation string. May contain {name}-style placeholders. Use {{name}} to escape literal braces.
Nested category. Contains further translation keys.

pluralForm.description: CLDR plural form. Selected by Intl.PluralRules at lookup time when the caller passes `count`. The `other` form is required as last-resort fallback.

zero.description: Used by some languages (e.g. Arabic) for 0.

two.description: Used by some languages (e.g. Welsh) for exactly 2.

few.description: Used by some languages (e.g. Russian, Polish) for small counts.

many.description: Used by some languages (e.g. Russian, Polish) for large counts.

other.description: Required. Used as fallback when the language-specific category is absent.
